_comment: Reverse-chronological updates from the start of the PhD (Sep 2023). Conference months verified against the official sites.

news.html: Started a research internship at Toyota Research Institute in Cambridge, MA.
Presented SwEYEpinch and Beyond at ACM CHI 2026 in Barcelona, Spain.
Fast Digitization in XR of Reality-Linked Gaussian-Splatted Proxies received a Best Research Demo Honorable Mention at IEEE VR 2026 in Daegu, Korea.
Presented two first-author works at IEEE VR 2026 (Daegu, Korea): a research demo on Gaussian-splatted proxies and a poster on bimanual teleoperation.
Presented VR Task Guidance Through Relative 6DoF Pose Specification at IEEE ISMAR 2025 in Daejeon, South Korea.
Began serving as Head TA for COMS 6173: VR & AR Seminar.
Presented Permanent Proxies for Bimanual Selection and Manipulation in VR at IEEE VR 2025 in Saint-Malo, France.
Presented two papers at IEEE ISMAR 2024 in Bellevue, WA: an XR GUI for visualizing ECS messages, and VHard, an XR UI for rehearsing climbing moves.
Began serving as Head TA for COMS 4172: 3DUI and AR.
Started my PhD in Computer Science at Columbia University, advised by Steven Feiner in the CGUI Lab.
